info.name: HealthBridge тАФ Local API demo
info.description:
**Runbook (single source of truth):** `docs/TESTING_AND_ML_LOCAL.md` at the **repo root** (not inside `release_1_backend` only).

**Quick:** Two processes тАФ Node `npm start` in `release_1_backend` (~7000) and `python app.py` in `ml_service` (~5000). For Postman without Firebase: `SKIP_FIREBASE=true` in `.env` and header `X-Dev-User-Id` (match `userId` in sync body). If ML is down, `/model/analyze` may still respond with `mlServiceAvailable: false`.

request.description: Quick check that Node is up. No headers needed.

item.name: 02 тАФ ML predict тАФ Normal-style vitals (direct Flask)

request.description: Calls **Python only** (bypasses Node + Mongo). Body is **tuned to the shipped `.pkl`** so this request returns **`Normal`** (verified with `predict.py`). **SpOтВВ 98** often classifies as **Abnormal** with this model (feature bins in `ml_service/predict.py`); use **97** for a stable demo. See `docs/TESTING_AND_ML_LOCAL.md`.

item.name: 03 тАФ ML predict тАФ Abnormal (direct Flask)

request.description: Same as server test: often returns **Abnormal** with high confidence. No Mongo required.

Full pipeline: loads **latest** HR/RR/SpOтВВ from Mongo for this user тЖТ calls ML тЖТ adds **curatedExplanation**, **sourceLink**, **sourceLabel**, **disclaimer**.

- If ML is off: `status` may be `Unknown`, `mlServiceAvailable: false`.
- **Recommendation text**: If `Abnormal` + SpOтВВ < 95 тЖТ Lung-style copy; Abnormal + HR > 100 тЖТ Heart & Stroke; else often **default** Health Canada text.

To force different stories, use different `devUserId` values **after** inserting matching vitals in Mongo for each user.

response.name: Example тАФ Abnormal + default Health Canada text
response.body:
{
    "status": "Abnormal",
    "confidence": 0.8923,
    "vitals": {
        "heartRate": 75,
        "respiratoryRate": 16,
        "spo2": 98,
        "height": 170,
        "weight": 70
    },
    "curatedExplanation": "Monitor your symptoms and consult a healthcare professional for personalized advice.",
    "sourceLink": "https://www.canada.ca/en/health-canada.html",
    "sourceLabel": "Health Canada",
    "disclaimer": "This app does not replace professional medical advice.",
    "mlServiceAvailable": true
}

response.name: Example тАФ Abnormal + low SpOтВВ (Lung Association)
response.body:
{
    "status": "Abnormal",
    "confidence": 0.88,
    "vitals": {
        "heartRate": 95,
        "respiratoryRate": 22,
        "spo2": 91,
        "height": 170,
        "weight": 75
    },
    "curatedExplanation": "Low oxygen saturation may indicate respiratory issues. Ensure adequate rest and consider consulting a healthcare provider.",
    "sourceLink": "https://www.lung.ca/",
    "sourceLabel": "Canadian Lung Association",
    "disclaimer": "This app does not replace professional medical advice.",
    "mlServiceAvailable": true
}

response.name: Example тАФ Normal
response.body:
{
    "status": "Normal",
    "confidence": 0.82,
    "vitals": {

request.description: Positive reinforcement when **no alerts** in the window, **тЙе5** HR docs, and a computable HR baseline. After **seed:demo**, expect a `message` string. If you have AlertLog rows in the window, `message` is null.
Uses **last NтИТ1** stored readings + body values for sustained check. Run **seed:demo** first so HR has history; otherwise HR may not alert.

**userId** must match **X-Dev-User-Id**. After **seed:demo**, this runs sustained evaluation on **stored** HR/SpOтВВ/temp; expect a new HR alert once (2h dedupe). Change `userId` in body if you change **devUserId** variable.
